name: Ably
description: Enterprise real-time messaging platform. REST API for publishing messages, retrieving channel history, managing presence, push notifications, token authentication, and usage statistics.

capabilities.name: messages_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a message to a specified channel.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve message history for a channel.

capabilities.name: messages_batch_publish
capabilities.description: Publish messages to multiple channels in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: channels_list
capabilities.description: Enumerate all active channels in the application.

capabilities.name: channels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata for a specific channel.

capabilities.name: presence_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current presence set for a channel.

capabilities.name: presence_history
capabilities.description: Retrieve presence event history for a channel.

capabilities.name: push_publish
capabilities.description: Send a push notification directly to devices.

capabilities.name: push_device_register
capabilities.description: Register a device for push notifications.

capabilities.name: push_device_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a registered push device.

capabilities.name: push_device_delete
capabilities.description: Unregister a device from push notifications.

capabilities.name: push_subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Subscribe a device or client to push notifications on a channel.

capabilities.name: push_subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a push notification channel subscription.

capabilities.name: tokens_request
capabilities.description: Request an Ably token for client authentication.
